member.summary: Sorts a pair of arrays. This array contains the keys; the first parameter to this method contains the corresponding items.
member.typeparam: The type of the keys.
The type of the items.
member.param: The array containing the keys.
The array containing the items.
The definition of a comparer to compare elements.

member.name: T:Nito.Comparers.Linq.EnumerableExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for enumerable sequences.

member.summary: Sorts the elements of a sequence in ascending order by using a specified comparer.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of .
The type of the key returned by .
member.param: A sequence of values to order.
A function to extract a key from an element.
The definition of a comparer to compare keys.

A function to extract a key from an element.

member.summary: Determines whether a sequence contains a specified element by using a specified equality comparer.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of .
member.param: A sequence in which to locate a value.
The value to locate in the sequence.
The definition of a comparer to compare values.

member.name: M:Nito.Comparers.Linq.EnumerableExtensions.Distinct``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{Nito.Comparers.EqualityComparerBuilderFor{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0}})
member.summary: Returns distinct elements from a sequence by using a specified equality comparer to compare values.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of .
member.param: The sequence to remove duplicate elements from.
The definition of a comparer to compare values.

member.name: M:Nito.Comparers.Linq.EnumerableExtensions.Except``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{Nito.Comparers.EqualityComparerBuilderFor{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0}})
member.summary: Produces the set difference of two sequences by using the specified equality comparer to compare values.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the sequences.
member.param: A sequence whose elements that are not also in will be returned.
A sequence whose elements that also occur in the first sequence will cause those elements to be removed from the returned sequence.
The definition of a comparer to compare values.

member.name: M:Nito.Comparers.Linq.EnumerableExtensions.GroupBy``2(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,``1},System.Func{Nito.Comparers.EqualityComparerBuilderFor{``1},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``1}})
member.summary: Groups the elements of a sequence according to a specified key selector function and compares the keys by using a specified equality comparer.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the sequence.
The type of the key.
member.param: A sequence whose elements are grouped.
A function to extract the key for each element.
The definition of a comparer to compare keys.

member.name: M:Nito.Comparers.Linq.EnumerableExtensions.GroupBy``3(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,``1},System.Func{``0,``2},System.Func{Nito.Comparers.EqualityComparerBuilderFor{``1},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``1}})
member.summary: Groups the elements of a sequence according to a key selector function. The keys are compared by using a comparer and each group's elements are projected by using a specified function.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the sequence.
The type of the key.
The type of the elements in the grouping.
member.param: A sequence whose elements are grouped.
A function to extract the key for each element.
A function to map each source element to an element in the grouping.
The definition of a comparer to compare keys.

member.name: M:Nito.Comparers.Linq.EnumerableExtensions.GroupBy``3(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,``1},System.Func{``1,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},``2},System.Func{Nito.Comparers.EqualityComparerBuilderFor{``1},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``1}})
member.summary: Groups the elements of a sequence according to a specified key selector function and creates a result value from each group and its key. The keys are compared by using a specified comparer.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the sequence.
The type of the key.
The type of the result values.
member.param: A sequence whose elements are grouped.
A function to extract the key for each element.
A function to create a result value from each group.
The definition of a comparer to compare keys.

member.summary: Groups the elements of a sequence according to a specified key selector function and creates a result value from each group and its key. Key values are compared by using a specified comparer, and the elements of each group are projected by using a specified function.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the sequence.
The type of the key.
The type of the elements in the grouping.
The type of the result values.
member.param: A sequence whose elements are grouped.
A function to extract the key for each element.
A function to map each source element to an element in the grouping.
A function to create a result value from each group.
The definition of a comparer to compare keys.

member.summary: Correlates the elements of two sequences based on key equality and groups the results. A specified equality comparer is used to compare keys.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the first sequence.
The type of the elements of the second sequence.
The type of the keys returned by the key selector functions.
The type of the result elements.
member.param: The first sequence to join.
The sequence to join to the first sequence.
A function to extract the join key from each element of the first sequence.
A function to extract the join key from each element of the second sequence.
A function to create a result element from an element from the first sequence and a collection of matching elements from the second sequence.
The definition of a comparer to compare keys.

member.name: M:Nito.Comparers.Linq.EnumerableExtensions.Intersect``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{Nito.Comparers.EqualityComparerBuilderFor{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0}})
member.summary: Produces the set intersection of two sequences by using the specified equality comparer to compare values.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the input sequences.
member.param: A sequence whose distinct elements that also appear in will be returned.
A sequence whose distinct elements that also appear in the first sequence will be returned.
The definition of a comparer to compare elements.

member.summary: Correlates the elements of two sequences based on matching keys. A specified equality comparer is used to compare keys.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the first sequence.
The type of the elements of the second sequence.
The type of the keys returned by the key selector functions.
The type of the result elements.
member.param: The first sequence to join.
The sequence to join to the first sequence.
A function to extract the join key from each element of the first sequence.
A function to extract the join key from each element of the second sequence.
A function to create a result element from an element from the first sequence and a collection of matching elements from the second sequence.
The definition of a comparer to compare keys.

member.name: M:Nito.Comparers.Linq.EnumerableExtensions.SequenceEqual``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{Nito.Comparers.EqualityComparerBuilderFor{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0}})
member.summary: Determines whether two sequences are equal by comparing their elements by using a specified equality comparer.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the input sequences.
member.param: A sequence to compare to .
A sequence to compare to the first sequence.
The definition of a comparer to compare elements.

member.name: M:Nito.Comparers.Linq.EnumerableExtensions.ToDictionary``2(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,``1},System.Func{Nito.Comparers.EqualityComparerBuilderFor{``1},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``1}})
member.summary: Creates a dictionary from a sequence according to a specified key selector function and key comparer.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the input sequence.
The type of the keys returned by the key selector function.
member.param: A sequence to create a dictionary from.
A function to extract the key for each element.
The definition of a comparer to compare keys.

member.name: M:Nito.Comparers.Linq.EnumerableExtensions.ToDictionary``3(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,``1},System.Func{``0,``2},System.Func{Nito.Comparers.EqualityComparerBuilderFor{``1},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``1}})
member.summary: Creates a dictionary from a sequence according to a specified key selector function, a comparer, and an element selector function.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements of the input sequence.
The type of the keys returned by the key selector function.
The type of the elements returned by the element selector function.
member.param: A sequence to create a dictionary from.
A function to extract the key for each element.
A transform function to produce a result element value from each element.
The definition of a comparer to compare keys.

member.param: A sequence whose distinct elements form the first set for the union.
